overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural dirt path at night, ascending illuminated stone stairs, and proceeding through a garden area with historic stone architecture and torch lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path approaching stone staircase

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the illuminated stone stairs in the distance

entered.detail: worn dirt trail through grassy countryside
massive spreading oak tree silhouetted against night sky
wide stone stairs with pillars leading upward
stone pillar with burning torch at base of stairs
tall grass and vegetation flanking the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path at night, approaching a large stone staircase illuminated by torchlight. The path is flanked by grass fields with a massive oak tree visible in the background against the dark sky.

events.description: transitions from dirt path onto wide stone staircase
torchlight from pillar flames becomes primary illumination source

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the wide stone staircase flanked by stone walls and torch pillars

notable_agents.action: armored guard holding torch at base of stairs
armored guard holding torch at base of stairs

entered.detail: stone block walls lining both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends the stone staircase, passing between two guards holding torches at the base. The stone walls flank the stairs as torchlight casts warm orange light against the cool night, replacing the ambient lighting of the open path.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden cemetery with stone markers and flower beds

events.description: exits staircase into upper garden area with cobblestone paths and stone markers

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the garden area past stone markers and purple flower beds

entered.detail: cobblestone pathway leading through the garden
short stone posts marking the path edges
purple flowering plants in cultivated beds
wooden picket fence in the distance
dense forest silhouette on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into an open garden or cemetery area, Geralt walks along a cobblestone path lined with stone markers and purple flower beds. The torch pillars fall behind as the path continues toward a distant tree line under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark rural landscape into a torch-lit architectural complex and finally into a manicured garden. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path flanked by grass fields and a massive oak tree, moving steadily toward a large stone staircase. As he ascends the stairs, the open night air is replaced by the enclosure of stone walls and the warm orange glow of torches held by guards. The scene then opens up as he emerges from the staircase onto a cobblestone path, shifting from the narrow climb to a wider garden area filled with stone markers and purple flower beds. Finally, the torch pillars recede into the background as the camera follows him toward a distant tree line under the dark sky.
